mapper.select: SELECT admin_id AS adminId, password, name, phone, role_id AS roleId, fail_count AS failCount, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM admin_user WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} AND password = #{password}
SELECT admin_id AS adminId, password, name, phone, role_id AS roleId, fail_count AS failCount, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM admin_user WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_user ( admin_id, password, name, phone, role_id, fail_count, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{adminId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{roleId}, #{failCount}, #{status}, NOW() )
